description: AD/SB Compliance Tracker — tracks airworthiness directives and service bulletins against fleet with deadline monitoring and serial-number-level applicability

hard_stops.label: AD Compliance Overdue
hard_stops.logic: An applicable Airworthiness Directive has passed its compliance deadline — aircraft is unairworthy

hard_stops.label: AD Not Assessed for Applicability
hard_stops.logic: A new AD has been issued and has not been reviewed for applicability to the operator's fleet

hard_stops.label: Recurring AD Missed
hard_stops.logic: A recurring AD inspection interval has been exceeded — aircraft is unairworthy until compliance is re-established

soft_flags.label: AD Approaching Deadline
soft_flags.logic: An applicable AD compliance deadline is within 30 days or 50 flight hours

soft_flags.label: SB Applicability Review Pending
soft_flags.logic: A new service bulletin has been issued and has not been reviewed for applicability

soft_flags.label: Recurring AD Due Soon
soft_flags.logic: A recurring AD inspection is due within 100 flight hours or 60 calendar days
